name: @sdlc-workflow/sunflower-view
description: Sunflower view layer for the sdlc-workflow plugin — HTML projection of .ai/workflows/ artifacts.

scripts.test: node --test tests/sunflower.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/foundation.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/project-root.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/runtime-manifest.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/runtime-buildid.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/cross-host-lock.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/runtime-store.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/hub-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/hub-upgrade.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/multi-repo-hub.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/heal-render.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/render-queue.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/code-browser.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/bootstrap-offpipeline.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/tray-format.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/tray-actions.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/tray-autostart.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/tray-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/tray-heartbeat.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/tray-protocol.test.mjs tests/unit/lib/leak-lexicon.test.mjs tests/unit/hooks/hooks.test.mjs tests/unit/gap-closure/design-phase1.test.mjs tests/unit/gap-closure/renderers-phase2.test.mjs tests/unit/gap-closure/walker-phase3.test.mjs tests/unit/snapshots/renderers.test.mjs tests/unit/snapshots/fragment-determinism.test.mjs tests/unit/renderers/story-section.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/consult-dispatch.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/imagery.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/uiproto.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/output-boundary.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/shared-reference-drift.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/batch-handoff-ship.test.mjs tests/unit/skills/yolo-gates.test.mjs

comment:dependencies: Runtime deps are EMPTY by design — every Claude-invoked entrypoint ships pre-bundled under dist/ (npm run build, esbuild). A fresh install needs no runtime `npm install`. The libs below are devDependencies: bundled into dist/ and imported by tests, never installed at a user's runtime. See docs/internal/archived/SELF-CONTAINED-BUILD-PLAN.md.
comment:tray: The tray app ships self-contained: bin/tray/* (systray2 Go helpers) and assets/app-icon* are COMMITTED, and scripts/tray.mjs speaks the helper protocol directly via lib/tray-protocol.mjs (no systray2 JS dep). Regenerating those committed artifacts is a rare one-off needing ad-hoc dev tools, intentionally NOT in devDependencies (keeps `npm ci`/CI lean + vuln-free): icons → `npm i -D sharp to-ico && npm run build:icon`; binaries → `npm i -D systray2 && cp node_modules/systray2/traybin/* bin/tray/`. See docs/internal/archived/TRAY-APP-PLAN.md.
